'''鈭歡-h-ch-dh''' ('''kagahchedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberneck|rubberneck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberneck|rubberneck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-h-ch-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kagahchedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigahchedhoko|thigahchedhoko]] || [[word:jigahchedhoko|jigahchedhoko]] || [[word:shigahchedhoko|shigahchedhoko]] || [[word:kigahchedhoko|kigahchedhoko]]
